examples: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me; for I wait on thee.
He walked with me in peace and uprightness, and turned many from sin.
I know also, my God, that thou triest the heart, and hast pleasure in uprightness.
As with the blond Scandinavian bodyguards who attended the Byzantine emperors, their uprightness was all the more starkly evidenced by the shiftiness of the guy they were protecting.
This has produced a desire for uprightness among politicians.
